title: CityWalk Globe Arrival Shot
description: Start outside the parks and frame the Universal globe with the CityWalk approach in the background. This is the perfect no-ticket kickoff challenge and a great benchmark photo for trip updates.
hint: Stay outside the turnstiles near the main security and arrival approach.
clues: You do not need park admission for this one.
Look for the classic Universal globe viewpoint before you enter CityWalk proper.

title: Lagoon Link Lookout
description: Walk the waterfront path and find a clean viewing angle where the lagoon ties together Islands of Adventure, Universal Studios, and CityWalk. Capture the connective heart of the resort.
hint: Head toward the central water and look for an open sightline between the districts.
clues: This is strongest near the open lagoon-side walkway outside the park gates.
Look for a place where the water and resort skyline both fit into the frame.
